creator: alexis.praga@proton.me
text:
There is actually a lot of documentation for rclone.
So I've decided to have a large main man page with all the options, commands briefly described, as well as examples.
Most of the documentation comes from rclone, but I've rewritten some parts here and there to be more concise.

I've put the main man page for review. If that's okay, i'll continue to follow the initial documentation structure so there will be 5 more man pages:
- one for each flag
- one for each command
- one for filters
- one for each backend
- one for remote controls
